Supported voice note & text commands — sent from the rep's personal phone to the Bricly number
Log activity + Hold request
"Showed Mike the maisonette at Dolphin Court, he wants a hold on CM9802"
EXAMPLE USED TODAY

Pipeline summary
"How is my pipeline?"
💡 How it works: Reps send voice notes or texts to the Bricly WhatsApp Business number from their own phones. Bricly AI parses the message and updates the CRM automatically — no app, no login, no form required from the field. Confirmations are sent back as a WhatsApp reply.
